name: ruby-tzinfo
title: ruby-tzinfo
description:
Daylight-savings aware timezone library
TZInfo is a Ruby library that uses the standard tz (Olson) database
to provide daylight savings aware transformations between times
in different time zones.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-tzinfo because Daylight-savings aware timezone library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-tzinfo as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-tzinfo with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-tzinfo --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
